description: Research the top 3 'Color Picker' extensions on the Microsoft Edge Add-ons store (https://microsoftedge.microsoft.com/addons). Extract the Name, Publisher, Rating (number), User Count (text), and the first sentence of the Description for the first three results. Compile this data into a CSV file at /home/ga/Desktop/extension_comparison.csv with headers: Name, Publisher, Rating, Users, Description.

metadata.occupation_context: IT Desktop Engineer - software procurement and vetting
